name: Coffee
description: Coffee is Uganda’s most important export crop.

name: Tea
description: Tea plantations thrive in Uganda’s cool highland climates.

name: Maize
description: Maize is widely grown and used to make posho.

name: Cassava
description: Cassava is a drought resistant staple food.

name: Banana
description: Bananas are used to make matoke, a popular Ugandan dish.

name: Beans
description: Beans are a major source of protein in Ugandan diets.

name: Rice
description: Rice farming has expanded due to irrigation projects.

name: Sorghum
description: Sorghum is used for porridge and traditional beverages.

name: Millet
description: Millet is used to make traditional bread and porridge.

name: Cotton
description: Cotton is grown for textile production.

name: Groundnuts
description: Groundnuts are used in sauces and snacks.

name: Sunflower
description: Sunflower seeds are processed into cooking oil.

name: Sweet Potato
description: Sweet potatoes are nutritious and widely consumed.

name: Pineapple
description: Pineapple farming supports fruit export markets.
